reason_for_refinement: Independent review showed that 16 joint branches and all 16 attempted 30-year-only branches ended without an independently accepted incumbent, so most branches never reached nonlinear centered replay. refined_first_corrective_action: Prospectively freeze a count-feasibility localization package that scales and audits the linear rows, retains and independently replays every incumbent, reallocates the 120-second station budget beyond a single three-second initial call, and compares an alternative integer-feasibility formulation.
